case_title: IMBELLONI, JOSEPH vs. TANNER, PAUL M. et al

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF IMBELLONI, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT TANNER, PAUL M.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IMBELLONI, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TANNER, PAUL M. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 925 SUTTER ST #103, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE PER CRC 522. JUDGMENT INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. CCP 415.46.
